properties.Observation: About twenty acres of paddy fields are cultivated in this canal and the canal is lined with concrete in places. A section about twelve meters long has broken off.
properties.Description:
Construction of 18m long Trough (with 0.50m x 0.40m section), 3 no of 6 m long spans, 2 nos of piers (2.5 m high x 2 nos piers)

Site preparation & setting out

Earth excavation for foundation or quarry materials and haul the surplus materials up to 30m
